title: Tinkers' Wood
description: Adds wood material variants to Tinkers' Construct, such as oak, spruce, and cherry.
body:
This mod is an addon for Tinkers' Construct which adds in wood material variants.

Since Tinkers' Construct 3.10.0, the base mod just adds variants for the default "wood", along with crimson, warped, and slimewood variants. This mod adds back the wood variants that were removed in 3.10.0, including:

* Oak
* Spruce
* Birch
* Jungle
* Acacia
* Dark Oak
* Cherry
* Mangrove

We are considering adding in more wood variants in the future, such as Twilight Forest.

If you want to contribute wood variants, we generate all material wood textures from an 8 color material palette. You can use the large plate tool part as a place to test the palettes.
